message:
🐛 Fix AI/ML dashboard test flakes in nightly (#10357) (#10360)

Nine integration tests in ai-ml-dashboard.spec.ts lacked the backend
health-check guard that other tests in the same file already have.
Without a reachable backend these tests would wait for stack discovery
and Prometheus metrics that can never arrive, eventually hitting the
900s suite wall-clock timeout.

Add the standard `request.get('/api/health')` + `test.skip()` guard
to every test that was missing it:
- stack dropdown UI is present and populated
- all stacks across all clusters are enumerated
- cards show live Prometheus metrics from vLLM
- KV Cache Monitor shows real cache utilization
- EPP Routing card shows endpoint picker activity
- P/D Disaggregation card shows architecture visualization
- Stack Monitor shows component health status
- GPU Overview shows GPU utilization data
- no cards show demo badge when live data is available

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
